title: Cobblemon for the Boys
description: A cobblemon modpack meant for playing on the Zack_ko and friends cobblemon server with their communities.
body:
This pack adds Pokemon into Minecraft using the newly-released Cobblemon mod update, dramatically changing how players are able to experience Minecraft. Simple Backpacks add a small variety of vanilla-esque craftable backpacks into the game, allowing players to easily transport apricorns, evolution stones, and the other new items added by Cobblemon! (Plus, they really add to that Pokemon feel, yknow?) Waystones have been included in order to simulate the mainline Pokemon game's "Fly" mechanics, allowing players to fast-travel to points of interest they have been to before. And rounding out the pack, Simple Voice Chat gives players the ability to communicate with one another using proximity chat, helping the world come alive, and empowering players to build in-game communities.

it adds: 
Backpacks, 
Simple Voice Chat, 
Ambient Sounds,
Emotecraft,
Indium,
Sodium,
JEI,
Xaeros map + mini maps

There are also a small handful of minor optimization mods to help improve multiplayer server performance!

credit to kenkuarchive for the profile icon.
